headlines.description: Chelsea were denied the chance to go top of the Premier League table as they were held to a 0-0 draw by Everton at a blustery Goodison Park on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea miss chance to go top with Everton draw

headlines.description: Southampton secured a point away from home for only the second time this season as they held hosts Fulham to a goalless draw at Craven Cottage on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Southampton draw at Fulham as Juric watches on

headlines.description: Wolverhampton Wanderers kicked off the Vitor Pereira era with an impressive 3-0 victory over Leicester City in the Premier League on Sunday to snap a four-match losing streak and move a step closer to the safety zone.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pereira gets first win as Wolves pummel Leicester

headlines.description: Bournemouth thrashed Manchester United 3-0 in the Premier League at a chilly Old Trafford on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dire Man Utd trounced at home by Bournemouth

headlines.description: Liverpool extended their lead at the top of the Premier League with a dominant but chaotic 6-3 win at Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah-inspired Liverpool beat Spurs in 6-3 thriller
